displayDescription.zh: 早期 R-CNN 系统依赖外部候选区域算法，在特征提取与检测之间形成瓶颈。Faster R-CNN 引入区域建议网络，与检测器共享卷积特征。这个统一的两阶段流水线成为高精度目标检测的标准参照。
displayDescription.en: Earlier R-CNN systems depended on external region proposal algorithms, creating a bottleneck between feature extraction and detection. Faster R-CNN introduced a Region Proposal Network that shares convolutional features with the detector. This unified two-stage pipeline became a standard reference point for accurate object detection.

description.en: Author-linked MATLAB implementation repository for Faster R-CNN.
description.zh: Faster R-CNN 作者关联的 MATLAB 实现仓库。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not copy publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复制出版方图形。

html.zh: R-CNN 已经大幅提升目标检测精度，但外部候选区域生成让流水线变慢且不够统一。 这段背景帮助观众把Faster R-CNN放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。
html.en: Object detection had made large accuracy gains with R-CNN, but external proposal generation made the pipeline slower and less elegant. This context helps viewers place Faster R-CNN in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.

html.zh: Faster R-CNN 让网络在计算视觉特征的同时学习提出候选框。检测因此成为学习型流水线，而不是无关模块之间的交接。
html.en: Faster R-CNN trains the network to propose boxes while it is already computing visual features. Detection becomes a learned pipeline rather than a hand-off between unrelated modules.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Faster R-CNN 视为让目标检测更端到端、更可学习的转折点。它的长期影响在于“候选区域 + 识别”框架仍塑造着研究者对精度、速度和定位权衡的解释。
html.en: Experts generally treat Faster R-CNN as a turning point that made object detection more end-to-end and learnable. Its long-term legacy is the proposal-and-recognition framework that still shapes how researchers explain accuracy, speed, and localization tradeoffs.

method.en: Region Proposal Network with shared features
method.zh: 共享特征的区域建议网络

artifact.zh: 带学习型候选区域的两阶段检测器

material.zh: 神经信息处理系统大会 论文与检测流水线

demo.zh: 提出候选框并分类目标

text.en: An RPN predicts likely object boxes directly from convolutional features instead of relying on a separate proposal method.
text.zh: RPN 直接从卷积特征预测可能的目标框，而不是依赖外部候选区域方法。

text.en: Proposal generation and object classification reuse the same feature maps, improving speed and consistency.
text.zh: 候选区域生成与目标分类复用同一组特征图，提高速度和一致性。

text.en: The system first proposes candidate boxes and then refines class labels and bounding boxes.
text.zh: 系统先提出候选框，再细化类别标签和边界框。
